input.user_input: Insert a mutual confidentiality clause after Section 5 of the consulting agreement. It should cover both parties and last 3 years after termination.

actual:
I would be happy to add that mutual confidentiality clause for you. However, it looks like you haven't uploaded the consulting agreement yet. 

Please upload the document, and I will insert the new clause after Section 5, ensure it covers both parties, set the 3-year post-termination duration, and update any subsequent section numbering and cross-references.
